task_description: Implement 4 priority features for CareVista: (1) AI Predictive Care Engine with falls/deterioration prediction, (2) Enhanced Family Portal with daily summaries, weekly reports, photo gallery, messaging, (3) CQC Compliance Automation with domain scoring, evidence packs, policy reviews, inspection prep, (4) Voice-to-text care notes and SBAR handover generator.

verification.summary: Backend builds with 14 pre-existing type errors (none from new code). Frontend builds with 19 pre-existing type errors (none from new code). All new migrations, controllers, routes, types, API clients, hooks, pages, and components compile cleanly. Exit code 0 for both builds.
